case_title: STACEY SHAY ENGLISH VS. SALESFORCE.COM et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER (PURSUANT TO STIPULATION) STAYING SUPERIOR COURT ACTION PENDING ARBITRATION (NO SASE PROVIDED)
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JUN-13-2003 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL FILED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF ENGLISH, STACEY SHAY SERVED JUL-17-2002, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT SALESFORCE.COM
FEE PAID FOR STIP AND ORDER TO STAY SUPERIOR COURT ACTION PENDING ARBITRATION FILED BY DEFENDANT SALESFORCE.COM

DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION. EACH PARTY TO BEAR THEIR OWN FEES AND COST, INCLUDES DISMISSAL OF ANY AND ALL CROSS COMPLAINT BY DEFENDANT SALESFORCE.COM.
FIRST APPEARANCE FEE PAID FILED BY DEFENDANT SALESFORCE.COM
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF DEC-06-2002 CONTINUED TO JUN-13-2003 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 212. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

CIVIL RIGHTS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ENGLISH, STACEY SHAY AS TO DEFENDANT SALESFORCE.COM DOES 1 TO 25 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR DEC-06-2002 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  SEP-03-2002 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         NOV-21-2002
